calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-065 GAP-A committed-action diversity falsifier on the CONVERSION substrate (ARM_STD_G2 + in-arm route-range gate)
items.note: GATED ON + ROUTED BY V3-EXQ-684a PASS (conversion_mechanism_identified; confirmed coordinator DB + manifest non-vacuous, readiness_ok=true, ARM_STD_G2 C_CONVERSION 3/3). 3-arm single-variable matched-entropy falsifier (ARM_0 proposer baseline / ARM_1 e2_world_forward STD_G2 under test / ARM_2 proposer T=2.5 matched-entropy NEGATIVE control), ARMED with the 684a-identified ARM_STD_G2 conversion config as the constant on all arms (use_modulatory_channel_routing + source=cand_world_summary + use_modulatory_selection_authority + authority_gain=2.0 + authority_normalize_basis=std). IN-ARM route-range non-vacuity gate (V3-EXQ-662 statistic read live at the select tick). claim_ids=[ARC-065] only. PASS (r1b_diversity_reaches_committed_action) = ARM_1 committed entropy strict-above BOTH controls on >=2/3 seeds with route-range + e2-divergence readiness met => supports. Route/e2 below floor => substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory, NEVER weakens). Readiness met + no lift => conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_routing => OFF-RAMP /implement-substrate (NOT a falsification). No weakens path. MECH-341 GAP-B substrate inactive (use_e3_score_diversity=False) so untagged; ARC-062/MECH-309/MECH-294 untouched.
